body_preview: - Trajectory graph pressure #1: "Close yyds state and model lifecycle gaps (deepseek_model_call_incomplete_count=8): Lifecycle causes: model_incomplete/open_after_ModelCallStarted=8; stale incomplete events from historical runs." - The janitor already handles RunStarted/RunCompleted and FailureObserved lifecycle gaps (find_missing_failure_observed, find_runs
expected_evidence: After the janitor runs in a subsequent session, `yyds state graph hotspots` shows reduced model_incomplete count (trending toward 0). Future trajectory snapshots show `deepseek_model_call_incomplete_count` decreasing. Test output confirms the new lifecycle closure logic fires for orphaned ModelCallStarted events. Implementation Notes: ModelCallStarted and Mo
title: Close ModelCall lifecycle gaps — write retroactive ModelCallCompleted for orphaned ModelCallStarted events
